title: Evida Local Evidence Ingestion Engine - Filled Backend Intake Pack
purpose: Developer-ready intake and implementation foundation for Evida's local evidence/document ingestion engine.
why_selected: The engine is a local backend/domain-heavy system with durable state, APIs/commands, queue, data integrity, verification, and observability requirements.
critical_invariants: Hash required for verified readable file
Source provenance required for AI use
Low-confidence OCR is not high-confidence source
recommended_next_action: Create ADR + canonical schemas + state machine before parser/OCR/UI implementation.
